summary: Backend-only testing completed for Authentication endpoints. All 21 tests passed (100%). Key features verified: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/session (Google OAuth), POST /api/auth/apple (Apple Sign In), JWT token generation/validation, and logout functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/auth/register correctly creates user with welcome bonus (3 Granelli), generates referral code, and returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login properly validates email/password with bcrypt, returns 401 for invalid credentials
GET /api/auth/me correctly validates JWT token in Authorization header and returns full user data
POST /api/auth/session (Google OAuth) validates session_id against Emergent OAuth service, creates/updates user, returns JWT
POST /api/auth/apple decodes identity_token without signature verification (suitable for dev), creates user if new
JWT tokens include user_id, iat, and exp claims with 7-day expiration
All auth endpoints return proper 401 status for invalid credentials
Duplicate email registration correctly rejected with 400 status
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All authentication backend APIs fully tested and working. Google OAuth session exchange depends on external Emergent service (https://demobackend.emergentagent.com/auth/v1/env/oauth/session-data) - error handling verified for invalid sessions. Apple Sign In decodes JWT without signature verification (verify_signature=False) which is intentional for development but should be noted for production. Both test accounts (test@test.com, reviewer@test.com) confirmed working.

user_registration.test_register_new_user_success: PASSED - User created with granelli=3, referral_code generated

user_login.test_login_success: PASSED - Returns user and JWT token

apple_auth.test_apple_auth_with_mock_valid_jwt: PASSED - Creates user with mock JWT

jwt_token_validation.test_jwt_token_structure: PASSED - Contains user_id, iat, exp with 7-day expiry

GET /api/auth/me.response: User object with granelli, badges, title, etc.

POST /api/auth/session.error_handling: 400 for missing session_id, 401 for invalid session_id

POST /api/auth/apple.error_handling: 401 for invalid JWT, 400 if email missing and not in token
